particulars.description: F/H property k/a 36 huntriss row scarborough with all fixtures and fittings. Together with all fixtures and fittings now or at any time hereafter on the property. The benefits of all rights licences and the goodwill of the mortgagor in relation to the business from time to time carried on at the property.

secured_details.description: All monies due or to become due from the company to the chargee on any account whatsoever
